case_title: NORTHPOINT INVESTORS, A CALIFORNIA GENERAL vs. RICKETTS, AMY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT RICKETTS, AMY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHPOINT INVESTORS, A CALIFORNIA GENERAL PARTNERSHIP, DBA NORTHPOINT APARTMENTS SERVED OCT-05-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RICKETTS, AMY STEVENS, PHIL
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
PHOTOCOPY FOR 11 COPY FOR CASE NUMBER 110423. DEFT COPY. FOR DEFENDANT RICKETTS, AMY

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHPOINT INVESTORS, A CALIFORNIA GENERAL PARTNERSHIP, DBA NORTHPOINT APARTMENTS COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-05-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 03 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT 03. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. REPORTER WAIVED. CLERK: G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANTS. PLTFF PRESENTS PRIMA FACIE CASE. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLTFF AND AGAINST BOTH DEFTS. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN AND RETURNED TO PLTFF. PLTFF SUBMITTED PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICKETTS, AMY STEVENS, PHIL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2210 STOCKTON STREET #214, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $4,583.55 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,583.55, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
